beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: POLS 101 or POLS 201 or POLS 202 or POLS 203 or POLS 204

requirementGroup.label: POLS 101 or POLS 201 or POLS 202 or POLS 203 or POLS 204
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: Three political science introductory courses chosen from POL S 101, 201, 202, 203, 204 or approved equivalent. Students may submit the Political Science Major Declaration Request Form when they have completed at least two introductory courses and are enrolled in and attending the third course. If more than one course is in progress, consult with a Political Science adviser about when you are eligible to submit the major declaration request.
